allow: PowerShell($zip = "C:\\Users\\Abhay\\Downloads\\files.zip"; if \(Test-Path $zip\) { Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $archive = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($zip\); $archive.Entries | Select-Object FullName, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize; $archive.Dispose\(\) } else { "ZIP NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell(try { $p = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8080/index.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "PAGE: $\($p.StatusCode\)" } catch { Set-Location "C:\\Users\\Abhay\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\MONICA MAHAVASTU"; Start-Process python -ArgumentList "-m","http.server","8080" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $p = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8080/index.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "PAGE \(restarted\): $\($p.StatusCode\)" })
